title: Create workout tracking app with progression and performance metrics

requirements.text: Create a backend data model to store workout sessions with fields for date, exercise name, sets, reps, weight, duration, and notes

quotes: I like to create an app where I can load and track my workout progression or performance or metrics

acceptanceCriteria: Workout sessions can be created with all required fields
Workout sessions can be retrieved by user

requirements.text: Implement backend functions to add new workout sessions and retrieve workout history

quotes: load and track my workout progression

acceptanceCriteria: Users can add new workout sessions
Users can retrieve their complete workout history
Workout data is associated with the authenticated user

requirements.text: Create a workout entry form that allows users to input exercise name, sets, reps, weight, duration, and optional notes

quotes: load and track my workout progression or performance or metrics

acceptanceCriteria: Form includes all required input fields
Users receive confirmation after successful workout submission

requirements.text: Build a workout history view that displays all logged workouts in reverse chronological order with date, exercise, and key metrics

quotes: track my workout progression or performance or metrics

acceptanceCriteria: All workout sessions are displayed in a clear, organized list
Key metrics (sets, reps, weight) are visible at a glance

requirements.text: Implement a progression visualization that shows performance trends over time for each exercise, displaying improvements in weight, reps, or volume

quotes: track my workout progression or performance or metrics

acceptanceCriteria: Users can view progression charts for individual exercises
Charts display trends over time for key metrics
Visual representation clearly shows improvement or changes in performance

requirements.text: Design a creative and coherent visual theme with a fitness-inspired aesthetic, using energetic colors, bold typography, and motivational design elements that remain consistent throughout the application
acceptanceCriteria: Visual theme is applied consistently across all pages and components
Color palette and typography choices support readability and user engagement
Design aesthetic aligns with fitness and performance tracking context

constraints: Must use Internet Identity for user authentication
All workout data must be associated with authenticated users
Backend must use single-actor Motoko architecture

required: Energetic workout hero background with abstract fitness elements (hero-fitness.dim_1200x600.png)
Minimalist dumbbell icon for workout entry section (dumbbell-icon.dim_128x128.png)
